rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY L HYDEN ET AL VS. KAREN L BANKHEAD ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT KAREN BANKHEAD'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED. Plaintiffs correctly claim that this action, as alleged (see paragraphs 7 and 10), arises out of alleged "falsehood"/perjury. This activity, in the absence of factual dispute, would not have been covered by Anti-SLAPP. However, in the absence of a concession, and based on the evidence before the Court, it cannot be determined as a matter of law that Defendant committed perjury. Flately v. Mauro (2006) 39 Cal.4th 299. Therefore, Defendant successfully shifted its burden under the first prong by showing that Plaintiffs' claims arise out of protected activities. Plaintiff failed to sustain its burden under the second prong. Defendant's allegedly wrongful activities are covered by the litigation privilege. Heterich v. Pelner (2018) 20 Cal.App.5th 1132. Contrary Plaintiff's argument, evidentiary exemption is not applicable under the circumstances of this action as alleged. As stated above, Plaintiffs correctly claims that their claims arise out of "falsehood"/perjury, i.e. the claims "are predicated on a judicial statement or publication itself" they are not merely used for evidentiary purposes to show intent. See Oren Royal Oaks Venture v. Greenberg, Bernhard, Weiss & Karma, Inc. (1986) 42 Cal.3d 1157. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PRIME METROPOLIS PROPERTIES, INC. VS. DANIELLE PITTMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 3, 2019 line 7. DEFENDANT DANIELLE PITTMAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege that form 1007 was served with the operative Notice and attach a complete copy of the Notice, including the form, if Plaintiff can so allege in good faith. SFRO 37.9(c) applies to all notices terminating the tenancy, whether "fault or no fault" or "with or without an option to cure." Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
